title: CombatLog+
description: The simplest and most configurable combat log plugin, designed for easy setup and powerful control.
body:
CombatLog+ is a lightweight, highly configurable combat logging plugin for Minecraft Paper servers. It helps prevent unfair combat logging by tracking players engaged in PvP and punishing those who disconnect during combat. This plugin is built with simplicity in mind, while offering powerful customization options through the configuration file.

✅ Key Features:
⚔️ Automatically puts players in combat when they take real PvP damage.

⏳ Displays a combat timer in the action bar, counting down per-player.

❌ Blocks specified commands and items during combat.

Kills and broadcasts when players log out mid-combat.

Fully supports per-world combat durations.

No dependencies.

Toggleable messages: Each message (combat enter, exit, logout, etc.) can be individually enabled/disabled in the config.
⚙️ Installation:
1. Download the CombatLog+ plugin .jar file.

2. Place it into your server's /plugins/ folder.

3. Restart or reload the server.

4. Edit the config.yml in /plugins/CombatLog+ to suit your needs.

5. Done! The plugin starts working instantly.
